info.title: Website Travel Supplier API
info.description: Supplier-facing Website Travel API for authentication, products, media, cancellation policies, and vouchers.

post.description: Grants an OAuth token to be used when querying the Website Travel API. This token should be provided as the access_token parameter to all other API calls.

400.description: Returned when there is an issue with the data provided

get.summary: Fetch a list of agents
get.description:
## Fetch a list of agents ##

Fetch a list of agents the authenticated supplier has access to.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
agentIdnIntegerAgent identifer.
agentFatherIdnIntegerAgent Father identifer.
agentCodenStringThree-letter Agent identifier.
namenStringAgent name.
emailAccountsyStringAgent accounts email address.
businessNumberyStringAgent business number.
street1nStringStreet address of Agent.
street2yStringSecondary street address of Agent.
suburbnStringAgent suburb.
stateyStringAgent state.
postcodeyStringAgent postcode.
countrynStringAgent Country.
workPhonenStringAgent work phone number.
currencynObjectCurrency object.
**Currency Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
isoCodenStringAgent's currency code (ISO-4217 three-character code).

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

get.summary: Fetch a list of agent fathers
get.description:
## Fetch a list of agent fathers ##

Fetch a list of agent fathers the authenticated supplier has access to.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
agentFatherIdnIntegerAgent Father identifer.
agentFatherNamenStringAgent Father name.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

get.summary: Find all thumbnails for a Supplier
get.description:
## Find all thumbnails for a Supplier ##

The returned result is an array of images. If no images are found a 404 response will be returned.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
mediaIdnIntegerMedia ID of the image.
pathnStringAbsolute URL path of image.
originalNamenStringOriginal name of file.
captionyStringOptional image caption.
activeyNullUnused.
mimeTypeyStringMime type of file.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Optional Product ID to fetch. Equivalent to "/supplier/product/{productId}/images?size=sm"

403.description: User does not have access to the requested product

404.description: Product not found, or no images for the product found

get.summary: Find a given Media Image by ID
get.description:
## Find a given Media Image by ID ## Using a specific Media ID fetch the image associated. #### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
mediaIdnIntegerMedia ID of the image.
pathnStringAbsolute URL path of image.
captionyStringOptional image caption.
activeyNullUnused.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Optional size of images to fetch. Defaults to small (sm).

400.description: Returned when size requested does not match allowed sizes.

403.description: Returned when you do not have access to the requested Image.

404.description: Returned when Image not found.

delete.summary: Delete a Media Image by ID
delete.description:
## Delete a Media Image by ID ##

Using a specific Media ID delete the image associated.

**Warning**: This removes the file from the filesystem entirely.

400.description: Returned when image is still in use by a Product.

403.description: Returned when you do not have access to the requested Image.

404.description: Returned when Image not found.

post.description:
## Upload a Image ##

Files should be uploaded using the Content-Type: multipart/form-data HTTP header. Raw data is expected.

Supported mime types are: image/jpg and image/jpeg. Maximum file size is 4Mb.

All image are resized as thumbnails to suit the system. Unless "isLogo" is true, then images will also be resized in system defined "medium" and "large" sizes. Original image will always remain.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
mediaIdnIntegerMedia ID of the image.
supplierIdnStringSupplier ID associated with image.
captionyStringOptional image caption.
pathnStringAbsolute URL path of original sized image.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Raw file data.

parameters.name: caption
parameters.description: Optional caption text.

parameters.name: isLogo
parameters.description: If true, smaller sizes of image provided will not be created.

200.description: Returned when successful. Returns a media object.

400.description: Returned when no file received.

415.description: Returned when file type is invalid or size of file is too large.

get.summary: Get all cancellation fee policies
get.description:
## Get all cancellation fee policies ##

Retrieves information about all of the supplier's cancellation fee policies. Output as for GET /cancellationpolicy/{cancellationFeePolicyId}.

403.description: User does not have access to the requested product

get.summary: Get information about a cancellation fee policy
get.description:
## Get information about a cancellation fee policy ##

Retrieves information about the given cancellation fee policy.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
cancellationFeePolicyIdnIntegerID of this cancellation fee policy.
policyNamenStringName of the cancellation fee policy.
policyDescriptionyStringDescription of cancellation fee policy.
usePercentModenbooleanWhether the cancellation fee policy uses "percent mode" (true) or "dollar mode" (false).
cancellationFeeRulesnarrayCollection of CancellationFeeRule objects.
isDefaultnbooleanWhether this is the default cancellation fee policy for this supplier.
**CancellationFeeRule Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
daysBeforeTravelDatenIntegerDuration before voucher travel date that this rule will be in effect. For example, if there are two rules with daysBeforeTravelDate=2 and daysBeforeTravelDate=5, the first rule will be in effect if the voucher is cancelled within two days of travel, and the second rule will be in effect between three and five days before travel.
feeAmountnFloatAmount of cancellation fee. This value is a percentage between 0 and 100 if the policy is in "percent mode", or a monetary amount in the applicable fare's currency if the policy is in "dollar mode".

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized

404.description: Cancellation fee policy not found

put.description:
## Update a cancellation fee policy ##

Update a cancellation fee policy. All fields are optional; you only need to pass in the fields that you want to change.

#### Response #### 201 response code on success.

requestBody.description: Fields to update a cancellation fee policy

policyName.description: Name of the cancellation fee policy.

usePercentMode.description: Whether the policy uses percent mode

isDefault.description: Whether this policy should become the default cancellation fee policy for this supplier.

daysBeforeTravelDate.description: Duration before travel date that this rule will be in effect

feeAmount.description: Amount of cancellation fee when rule applies (a percentage value when policy is in percent mode, or a monetary amount when in dollar mode)

400.description: Bad request

403.description: Unauthorized

404.description: Cancellation fee policy not found

delete.description:
## Delete a Cancellation Fee Policy ##

Deletes the cancellation fee policy with the given and Cancellation Fee Policy ID.

post.summary: Create a new cancellation fee policy
post.description:
## Create a new cancellation fee policy ##

Creates a new cancellation fee policy based on the JSON array of data provided.

## Response ## **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
cancellationFeePolicyIdnIntegerID of the new cancellation fee policy.

requestBody.description: Required fields to create a cancellation fee policy

policyName.description: Name of the cancellation fee policy.

usePercentMode.description: Whether the policy is in percent mode (true) or dollar mode (false).

isDefault.description: Whether this policy should become the default cancellation fee policy for this supplier.

daysBeforeTravelDate.description: Duration before travel date that this rule will be in effect.

feeAmount.description: Amount of cancellation fee when rule applies (a percentage value when policy is in percent mode, or a monetary amount when in dollar mode).

400.description: Returned when there is an issue with the data provided.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized

500.description: Returned when fatal issues are encountered.

get.summary: Get categories by ID
get.description:
## Get categories by ID ##

Retrieves one or more categories by their ID.

parameters.name: categoryIds
parameters.description: List of Category IDs to retrieve.

schema.description: Comma separated list of Category IDs

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

404.description: No matching categories found.

get.summary: Returns a list of all Product Categories and ID's
get.description:
## Returns a list of all Product Categories and ID's ##

Get the a list of Product Categories and their ID's. Note at this point it may return Product Categories that the logged in Agent has no Products in. Use the codes returned to limit search results to Products in those Categories. See documentation for /products.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
resultsnArray (Objects)Array of Category objects.
**Category Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
idnIntegerID of Category.
textnStringName of Category.

parameters.name: paramType
parameters.description:
One of
productclasses - List of Product Class Ids
faretypecategories - List of available Fare Type Category Ids
faretags - List of available Fare Tags.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

get.summary: Get a list of categories of a given type
get.description:
## Get a list of categories of a given type ##

Returns a list of IDs for the selected Category. Unlike Countries and productCategories the results can be filtered in hierarchies for example passing in the Country code for Australia to the state query will limit the returned states to just those in Australia. The same filtering works for region and locality and the transport activity and accommodation results. In the case of the latter three for example you can return all activities in a region by supplying the region(s) as an argument. Each hierarchy filter (except Country) can be applied multiple times with different values. For example by passing the State ID's for NSW and Queensland to the activities filter you can see all activities that are available in those two states. Note at this point you can not filter by the activity, transport or accommodation type this means you can not get all states that kayaking is available in.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
resultsnArray (Objects)Array of Category objects.
**Category Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
idnIntegerID of Category.
textnStringName of Category.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the Category to return. Can be (countries, states, regions, locations, transport (transport type), activities, accommodation)

parameters.name: term
parameters.description: Limit the returned results to those matching partially the term provided.

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Limit results to countryId.

parameters.name: states
parameters.description: Limit results to localityIds comma delimited ID's (localities are towns and cities).

parameters.name: regions
parameters.description: Limit results to regionIds comma delimited ID's (regions are geographic regions Eg. Whitsunday's.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

400.description: Returned on an invalid request.

get.description:

Returns a list of IDs for the selected Product.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The ID of the Product to get categories for

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

400.description: Returned on an invalid request.

get.summary: Get information about a package
get.description:
## Get information about a package ##

Retrieves information about the given package.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
optionIdnIntegerID of the Package Option.
labelnStringLabel for the Package Option.
orderingnIntegerSort order for the Package Option (affects order shown in UI).
packageProductsnArrayArray of Package Product objects.
**PackageProduct Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
packageProductIdnIntegerID of the Package Product.
productPricesDetailIdnIntegerID of the ProductPricesDetail.
orderingnIntegerSort order for the Package Product (affects order shown in UI).
quantitynIntegerQuantity of the ProductPricesDetail to be included in the package.
rrpDifferenceyFloatAmount to add onto package's base RRP if this Package Product is selected. If null, the difference between the RRP for this product and the RRP for the cheapest product in the option will be used. Must be null for the cheapest product in this package option.

parameters.name: productPricesDetail
parameters.description: The ID of the ProductPricesDetail

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized

404.description: Returned when the ProductPricesDetail is not found

post.summary: Add an option to a Package
post.description:
## Add an option to a Package ##

Adds an option to the Package based on the JSON array of data provided.

## Response ## **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
optionIdnIntegerID of the newly created Package Option.

parameters.name: productPricesDetailId
parameters.description: The ID of the ProductPricesDetail

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Label for the Package Option.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Sort ordering for the Package Option. The ordering for other Options will be adjusted as necessary to accommodate the new Option's ordering.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

404.description: Returned when the ProductPricesDetail is not found

put.description:
## Update a Package Option ##

Update a Package Option. All fields are optional; you only need to pass in the fields that you want to change.

#### Response #### 204 on success

parameters.description: The ID of the ProductPricesDetail

parameters.name: optionId
parameters.description: The ID of the Package Option

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Label for the Package Option.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Sort ordering for the Package Option. The ordering of other Options will be adjusted as needed to accommodate this.

204.description: Returned when the update was successful.

400.description: Returned when there is an issue with the data provided.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

404.description: Returned when the ProductPricesDetail or PackageOption is not found

get.summary: Get information about the allocations for a product
get.description:
## Get information about the allocations for a product ##

Retrieves information about the allocations for the given product.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
resultsnArrayList of Allocations, formatted as per GET product/{productId}/allocation/{allocationId}.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The ID of the Product

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

404.description: Product not found

get.summary: Get information about the given allocation
get.description:
## Get information about the given allocation ##

Retrieves information about the given allocation.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
allocationIdnIntegerID of this Allocation.
allocationNamenStringName of the Allocation.
defaultQuantitynIntegerDefault quantity for this Allocation.
startDatenStringStart date of this Allocation in format YYYY-MM-DD.
endDateyStringEnd date of this Allocation in format YYYY-MM-DD.
blockoutDaysyStringDays of the week on which this product is not available. Comma-separated list of integers (eg '3,5') where 0 => Sunday, 1=> Monday etc.
bookingDetailIdyIntegerID of the BookingDetail Object for this allocation.
bookingBufferyIntegerNumber of days before booking date that reservations through Website Travel should be disabled.
productPricesDetailsIdsnStringComma-separated listed of IDs for the ProductPricesDetails that this Allocation should apply to.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The ID of the Product

parameters.name: allocationId
parameters.description: The ID of the Allocation

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

404.description: Product or Allocation not found

post.description:
## Create a new Allocation ##

Creates a new Allocation for the given Product.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
allocationIdnIntegerID of the newly created Allocation.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The ID of the Product

blockoutDays.description: Days of the week when the product is not available.

bookingDetailId.description: ID for the BookingDetail Object for this allocation.

bookingBuffer.description: Number of days before booking date to disable reservations.

productPricesDetailsIds.description: IDs for the ProductPricesDetails that this Allocation should apply to.

400.description: Returned when there is an issue with the data provided.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

404.description: Returned when Product is not found.

500.description: Returned when fatal issues are encountered.

put.description:
## Update an Allocation ##

Updates an existing Allocation. All fields are optional: you only pass in the fields that you want to change. Note that you cannot remove existing ProductPrices from an Allocation, although you can add new ones. A ProductPrice can only belong to one Allocation at a time, so adding it to one Allocation will have the effect of removing it from any previous Allocation that it belonged to.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The ID of the Product

parameters.name: productAllocationId
parameters.description: The ID of the Product Allocation

blockoutDays.description: Days of the week when the product is not available.

bookingDetailId.description: ID for the BookingDetail Object for this allocation.

bookingBuffer.description: Number of days before booking date to disable reservations.

newProductPricesDetailsIds.description: IDs for the ProductPricesDetails to add to this Allocation.

400.description: Returned when there is an issue with the data provided.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

404.description: Returned when Product or Allocation is not found.

500.description: Returned when fatal issues are encountered.

delete.summary: Deletes an Optional Field from a BookingDetail Object
delete.description:
## Deletes an Optional Field from a BookingDetail Object ##

Deletes an Optional Field from a BookingDetail Object. Any existing bookings made when this optional field was in use will continue to hold data for this field. However, following a successful delete, the optional field will not be available for future bookings.

400.description: Returned when there is an issue with the data provided.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

404.description: Returned when no matching record found.

500.description: Returned when fatal issues are encountered.

get.summary: Get a list of bookings
get.description:
## Get a list of bookings ##

Retrieve a list of bookings matching the search criteria. If no search criteria are provided, the default search returns a list of all bookings for activities on or after today's date.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
totalMatchingRecordsnIntegerTotal number of bookings found that match the search criteria.
fetchedRecordsnIntegerNumber of bookings returned in this response.
resultsnArrayList of Booking objects.
**Booking Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
bookingIdnIntegerUnique identifier for this booking.
fareNamenStringName of the fare type that this booking was made for.
allocationNamenStringName of the availability allocation group that this booking was made for.
bookingDatenDate
(yyyy-mm-dd)		Date that the booking is for.
createdDatenDate
(ISO8601 format)		Date and time of the booking request
redeemersnArray of Redeemer ObjectsCustomers associated with this booking
paxnIntegerNumber of people on this booking.
NetRatenFloatValue of this booking to the operator. (per qty)
RRPnFloatOperator retail price of this booking (per qty)
voucherNumbernStringVoucher number for this booking.
Note that one voucher may have multiple bookings.
For example if the booking is for multiple nights of accommodation.
cancelledDateyDate
(ISO8601 format)		Date and time that the booking was cancelled.
cancelledReasonyStringReason that booking was cancelled.
**Redeemer Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
namenStringCustomer Name.
emailnStringCustomer email address
phonenStringCustomer contact number
pickupyStringPickup details for this customer
commentyStringAdditional information
optionalFieldsnArray of Optional Field ObjectsFurther requested information
**Optional Field Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
questionnStringOptional field question
answernStringCustomer answer

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Only return bookings for the product with this ID.

parameters.name: redeemer
parameters.description: Only return bookings that partially match this redeemer name.

parameters.name: voucherNumber
parameters.description: Only return bookings that match this voucher number.

parameters.name: bookingDateAfter
parameters.description: Only return bookings for activities on or after this date.

parameters.name: bookingDateBefore
parameters.description: Only return bookings for activities before this date.

parameters.name: createdDateAfter
parameters.description: Only return bookings which were placed on or after this date.

parameters.name: createdDateBefore
parameters.description: Only return bookings which were placed before this date.

parameters.name: cancelledDateAfter
parameters.description: Only return bookings which have been cancelled on or after this date.

parameters.name: cancelledDateBefore
parameters.description: Only return bookings which have been cancelled before this date.

parameters.name: cancelled
parameters.description: Only return bookings which have/have not been cancelled.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort the results by this field.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Sort the results in this direction.

parameters.name: recordsStart
parameters.description: Position of first result to return.

parameters.name: recordsLength
parameters.description: Number of results to return.

400.description: Invalid parameters provided

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized

put.summary: Make adjustments to an Allocation's availability
put.description:
## Make adjustments to an Allocation's availability ##

Sets an adjusted availability for a given date range. For example, if the default availability is 20 and an adjustment of -5 is passed in, availability during that date range will be adjusted to 15. Each call to this method will replace the previous adjustment for the dates provided, if any. Adjustments will NOT be changed if the default availability for the Allocation is changed.

startDate.description: Start date for adjustment to be applied to.

endDate.description: End date for adjustment to be applied to. Defaults to startDate.

adjustment.description: Amount to adjust the default quantity by.

400.description: Returned when there is an issue with the data provided.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

404.description: Returned when Product or Allocation is not found.

500.description: Returned when fatal issues are encountered.

get.description: Get information about a Price

400.description: Product or product price not found

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized

get.summary: Get all prices for a Product
get.description: Get all prices for a Product

400.description: Product or product price not found.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

post.summary: Add a price to a Product
post.description:
## Add a price to a Product ##

Adds a price to the Product based on the JSON array of data provided.

## Response ## **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
productPricesDetailsIdnIntegerID of the newly created Product Prices Detail.

requestBody.description: Add price details for a product.

agents.description: Ids of the agents that have access to this price.

bookingSystemMapping.description: Fields used to map product to an external reservation system.

cancellationFeePolicyId.description: ID of product's cancellation fee policy.

childMaxAge.description: Maximum age for children to be eligible.

childMinAge.description: Minimum age for children to be eligible.

defaultFare.description: Is this the default fare for the Product?

duration.description: Duration of the tour in days.

durationNights.description: Duration of the tour in nights.

earlyBirdLeadDays.description: Lead time that fare must be booked in advance.

fareQtyRestrictions.description: Total quantity this fare that agents must select.

levy.description: Any levy charged on top of RRP at point of travel.

note.description: Any special comments made by Supplier.

numAdults.description: Number of adults who are eligible to travel on this fare.

numChildren.description: Number of children who are eligible to travel on this fare.

pax.description: Number of people the price covers.

periodEnd.description: End date of the active period.

periodStart.description: Start date of the active period.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

put.description:
## Update a Price ##

Update a Price. All fields are optional; you only need to pass in the fields that you want to change. When editing a live price, a copy will be made of the price in draft status, and the ID of this new price will be returned in the response body. This means that the existing live price will remain in effect until the new draft price has gone through our product approval process. On the other hand, edits to draft prices and to MarketPlace prices which have been directly negotiated between supplier and agent will be made to the existing Price, and no response body will be returned.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
productPricesDetailsIdnIntegerID of new Price (if any).

requestBody.description: Update price details for a product.

agents.description: Ids of the agents that have access to this price.

bookingSystemMapping.description: Fields used to map product to an external reservation system.

cancellationFeePolicyId.description: ID of product's cancellation fee policy.

childMaxAge.description: Maximum age for children to be eligible.

childMinAge.description: Minimum age for children to be eligible.

defaultFare.description: Is this the default fare for the Product?

duration.description: Duration of the tour in days.

durationNights.description: Duration of the tour in nights.

earlyBirdLeadDays.description: Lead time that fare must be booked in advance.

fareQtyRestrictions.description: Total quantity this fare that agents must select.

levy.description: Any levy charged on top of RRP at point of travel.

note.description: Any special comments made by Supplier.

numAdults.description: Number of adults who are eligible to travel on this fare.

numChildren.description: Number of children who are eligible to travel on this fare.

pax.description: Number of people the price covers.

periodEnd.description: End date of the active period.

periodStart.description: Start date of the active period.

packageOnlyFare.description: Is this a Package only fare?

travelEnd.description: End date of the travel period.

travelStart.description: Start date of the travel period.

204.description: Returned when existing draft price updated successfully.

post.summary: Create a draft version of the product price
post.description:
## Create a draft version of the product price ##

Creates a draft version of the product price which can be used to make further edits. While the main route to PUT changes to a product price will automatically create a new draft when necessary and return the new ID, some other routes (e.g. to manage package options) do not.

The exact behaviour depends on the current status of the product prices detail passed in:

  • If it's already in Draft state no action will be taken
  • If it's in Candidate or Approved state, it will be reverted to Draft state
  • If it's in Live or History state, a duplicate Draft version of the price will be created
  • If it's in Delete Pending or Delete Approved state, an 422 error will be returned

400.description: Returned when there is an issue with the data provided.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

404.description: Returned when the product or price is not found.

422.description: Returned when there is an issue with the data provided.

500.description: Returned when fatal issues are encountered.

get.summary: Get information about the supplier's products
get.description:
## Get information about the supplier's products ##

Retrieves information about the products that belong to the logged-in supplier. Note that the records returned are "productdetails", not products, so there may be multiple records in different statuses with the same product ID.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
fetchedRecordsnIntegerNumber of records returned in this response.
totalMatchingRecordsnIntegerTotal number of matching records found.
resultsnArrayList of ProductsDetails objects.
**ProductsDetails Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
productIdnIntegerProduct ID
productNamenStringProduct name
productStatusCodenCharacterProduct status code
productStatusnStringProduct status name
deletePendingnBooleanThis product has a delete request pending

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Only return productsdetails for the product with this ID.

parameters.name: productName
parameters.description: Only return productsdetails that partially match this name.

parameters.name: productStatusCode
parameters.description: Only return productsdetails that are in this status.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort the results by this field.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Sort the results in this direction.

parameters.name: recordsStart
parameters.description: Position of first result to return.

parameters.name: recordsLength
parameters.description: Number of results to return.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized

get.summary: Get information about a ProductsDetail
get.description:
## Get information about a ProductsDetail ##

Retrieves information about the given ProductsDetail

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
productIdnIntegerProduct ID
productStatusCodenstringOne-character product status code
productStatusnStringProduct status name
productNamenStringProduct name
productCountrynString2-character ISO 3166 Country code
productTimezoneyStringString (e.g. 'Australia/Sydney') representing products timezone. Based on timezone database @ https://www.iana.org/time-zones
productClassIdnIntegerProduct class ID
ratingyDecimalValid only for Accommodation products. A 'star' rating in the range of 1-5.
productClassnStringName of product class
teasernStringShort product description
descriptionnStringLong product description
itineraryDetailsyArray (Object)Array of itineraryDetails Objects. Example:

"itineraryDetails": [
 {
     "itineraryTitle": "day1",
     "itineraryBreakfast": 0,
     "itineraryLunch": 1,
     "itineraryDinner": 0,
     "itineraryDescription": "day1 details"
 },
 {
     "itineraryTitle": "day2",
     "itineraryBreakfast": 1,
     "itineraryLunch": 0,
     "itineraryDinner": 0,
     "itineraryDescription": "day2 details"
 }
]
For itineraryBreakfast / itineraryLunch / itineraryDinner: 1 - meal provided, 0 - not provided.
departuresPickupsnStringInformation about pickups, departures or opening hours
extrasnStringInformation about extras which can be added to the product
voucherInstructionsnStringInstructions to be printed on the voucher
voucherInformationContactDetailsBitsnInteger Combined bitwise value of address contact details to be printed on voucher. Depending on your supplier setup this will either be the details of your supplier account or contact details specific to this product. Combination of:

Work phone = 1
Free phone = 2
Address line one = 4
Address line two = 8
Suburb/city = 16
State = 32
Postcode = 64
Country = 128
Email = 256
agentInstructionsnStringInstructions to be made available to agents when placing orders
noRefundsnBooleanWhether refunds should be permitted for this product. Default value is true.
noRefundsMessagenStringMessage to be displayed when an attempt is made to get a refund for a no-refunds product
contactEmailyStringContact email address set for product
contactPhoneyStringContact phone number set for product
addressLineOnenStringFirst line of product address
addressLineTwonStringSecond line of product address
addressSuburbnStringSuburb line of product address
addressCitynStringcity line of product address
addressStatenStringState line of product address
addressPostcodenStringPostcode of product address
mediaPathnArrayPath to product's thumbnail image
mediaIdnIntegerMedia ID of product's thumbnail image
countriesnArrayList of IDs of countries associated with this product
statesnArrayList of IDs of states associated with this product
regionsnArrayList of IDs of regions associated with this product
locationsnArrayList of IDs of locations associated with this product
accommodationnArrayList of IDs of accommodation categories associated with this product
activitiesnArrayList of IDs of activity categories associated with this product
transportnArrayList of IDs of transport categories associated with this product
startLocationyIntegerLocation ID of product start location
endLocationyArrayLocation ID of product end location
minAgeRecommendationnIntegerMinimum recommended age.
maxAgeRecommendationnIntegerMaximum recommended age.
ageRestrictionnStringDescription of any age restrictions (e.g. for an R18 hostel).
fitnessRequirementnStringDescription of fitness requirements.
minGroupSizenIntegerMinimum tour group size.
maxGroupSizenIntegerMaximum tour group size.
dietaryRequirementsnIntegerDietary requirements.
luggageRequirementsnStringLuggage requirements.
includedItemsnArray(String)Description of items included in fare.
bringItemsnArray(String)Description of items the guest is expected to bring.
voucherTermsyStringDescription of terms and conditions, disclaimers etc.
weekDaysyArray(String)Comma-separated list of days of the week that trip departs. This field is "Deprecated", recommended to use "departureDates" field.
departureDatesyStringComma-separated tour departure dates.
recurrenceDateyStringFrequency of departure recurrence (e.g. "Weekly", "Daily", "Monthly"). This field is "Deprecated", recommended to use "departureDates" field.
specialCircumstanceDateyStringDescription of special dates which affect departure info (e.g. Christmas Day).. This field is "Deprecated", recommended to use "departureDates" field.
operatingPartneryStringOperating partner.
tourCodeyStringTour code.
mandatoryFieldCheckoutyArrayArray of customer fields absolutely necessary to make the booking. Customer field names: title, phone, emailAddress, dateOfBirth, redeemerCountry, postcode.
**itineraryDetails Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
itineraryTitleyStringitinerary Title Example day 1
itineraryBreakfastyInteger1 - meal provided. 0 - not provided
itineraryLunchyInteger1 - meal provided. 0 - not provided
itineraryDinneryInteger1 - meal provided. 0 - not provided
itineraryDescriptionyStringDetails of the specific day

post.description:
## Create a Product ##

Creates a new Product with the details provided.

#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
productIdnIntegerID of the newly created Product.

Note that HTML text fields support a very limited subset of HTML - <p>, <ol>, <ul>, <li> and <br> elements only are permitted, and no attributes may be used on any of these elements. This helps us to prevent malicious content and ensure a consistent visual presentation for all products in our TravelDesk™ system.

mediaId.description: ID of the Media Image use as Product thumbnail.

timezone.description: String (e.g. "Australia/Sydney") representing products timezone. If left empty, will default to Suppliers timezone. Based on timezone database @ https://www.iana.org/time-zones

productClassId.description: ID of Product Class (see output from /categories/productclasses).

apiProviderId.description: Internal use only, if you've been given a value to use for this property then please do so here.

externalId.description: Internal use only, if you've been given a value to use for this property then please do so here.

rating.description: Valid only for Accommodation products. A 'star' rating in the range of 1-5 and accepting of half values e.g. '3.5'.

itineraryDetails.description: Array of itinerary details in objects.

extras.description: Information about extras which are not included in product price - eg airport transfers, meals.

voucherInstructions.description: Information for customer, including phone numbers and confirmation instructions

voucherInformationContactDetailsBits.description: Combined bitwise value of contact details to be printed on voucher.

noRefundsMessage.description: Message explaining why refunds are not available.

cancellationFeePolicyId.description: ID of product's cancellation fee policy (not applicable if noRefunds is turned on).

startLocation.description: Category ID of Product start location.

secondaryLocation.description: Category ID of Product's secondary location.

activityTypes.description: Array of Category ID's (Integers) of activity type.

accommodationTypes.description: Array of Category ID's (Integers) of accommodation types.

transportTypes.description: Array of Category ID's (Integers) of transport types.

ageRestriction.description: Description of any age restrictions (e.g. for an R18 hostel).

includedItems.description: Array of items included in the fare.

bringItems.description: Array of items that guest is expected to bring.

voucherTerms.description: Description of terms and conditions, disclaimers etc.

weekDays.description: Array of days of week that trip departs.

specialCircumstanceDate.description: Description of special dates which affect departure info (e.g. Christmas Day).

mandatoryFieldCheckout.description: Array of customer fields absolutely necessary to make the booking. Customer field names: title, phone, emailAddress, dateOfBirth, redeemerCountry, postcode.

put.description:
## Update a Product ##

Updates a product with the details provided. Changes will be made to the Draft ProductsDetail - a new Draft ProductsDetail will be created if the product does not already have one. The draft must be submitted using the POST /product/{productId}/submit method and go through an approval process before the changes take effect. All fields are optional - only pass in the ones which you wish to change.

get.summary: Find Product images for a given Product ID
get.description:
## Find Product images for a given Product ID ## The returned result is an array of images. If no images are found a 404 response will be returned. #### Example #### `/supplier/product/554/images` will return any gallery images attached to the product with ID 554. #### Response #### **Top Level Result Object**
Field name Nullable Type Description
mediaIdnIntegerMedia ID of the image.
pathnStringAbsolute URL path of image.
captionyStringOptional image caption.
activeyBooleanTrue on first image in set.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Optional size of images to fetch. Defaults to small (sm).

403.description: Returned when you do not have access to the requested Product.

404.description: Returned when Product not found, or no images for the Product are found.

put.description:
## Set Product Images ##

Associates already uploaded images to a Product.

#### Response ####

See **Status Codes**

parameters.name: mediaIds
parameters.description: Comma separated list of Media ID's. Maximum of 10 per product. If some images were already set, then only the first X will be used to fill the remaining spaces.

204.description: Returned when Media ID's supplied matched existing ID's set against Product (no-change).

400.description: No Media ID's were received.

403.description: Returned when you do not have access to the requested Product.

404.description: Returned when Product not found or Media ID's supplied were not found.

413.description: Returned when maximum number of Product images has already been set.

delete.description:
## Delete Product Images ##

Deletes images from being associated with a Product. Does NOT remove the file entirely.

#### Response ####

See **Status Codes**

schema.description: Comma separated list of Media ID's

400.description: No Media ID's were received.

403.description: Returned when you do not have access to the requested Product.

404.description: Returned when Product not found or Media ID's supplied were not found.

get.summary: Get Voucher Details
get.description:
## Get Voucher Details ##

Given a voucher code, returns information regarding that voucher

parameters.name: voucher
parameters.description: Voucher code

netRate.description: Net Rate (per quantity, in operator's fare currency)

rrp.description: Recommended Retail Price at time of sale (per quantity, in operator's fare currency)

discounted.description: Denotes whether this voucher's Net and RRP were overridden

quantity.description: Quantity of the voucher belonging to this particular Customer

400.description: Returned when required arguments not provided.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.

404.description: Returned when the voucher details are not accessible.

post.description:
Call this route to claim voucher(s) directly.

  • There must be either Voucher Id or Ticket Number or Booking Reference Number specified for each travel date.
  • Each row should have minimum of Voucher Id and Quantity.
  • Travel Date is optional if claim is based on voucher number.
  • Travel Date is mandatory if claim is based on ticket number.
**Example Request Parameters** 
{
  "claims":[
    { "voucherId":"RED57887647", "travelDate":"2017-06-12", "quantity":1, "ticketNumber":"2342342" },
    { "voucherId":"RED57887648", "travelDate":"2017-01-28", "quantity":1 },
    { "voucherId":"RED57887650", "quantity":1 },
    { "travelDate":"2017-06-30", "quantity":2, "ticketNumber":"2331658" },
    { "travelDate":"2019-02-26", "quantity":2, "bookingReference":"WTT15468-032507"}
  ]
}
#### Response #### **Top Level Result Object** - Array of
Field name Nullable Type Description
voucherIdnstringVoucher Id or Ticket Number (if claim is based on ticket number)
successnbooleantrue - successfully claimed, false - could not be claimed
messagenstringA detailed explanation of the attempted claim's condition.
Note: Even successfully claimed items can have further detail/instruction. You should review all messages

voucherId.description: Voucher Id, mandatory if ticket number is empty

quantity.description: Number of this Voucher being claimed

travelDate.description: Travel Date of the voucher, optional if claim is based on voucher id

ticketNumber.description: Ticket Number, mandatory if voucher id is empty

200.description: Returned when successful. All claim requests processed successfully. Still should check "message" in the response for further details

202.description: Returned when partially successful (multiple claims in a single request). Check both "success" and "message" in response for further details on individual items

400.description: Returned when all claim items produce an error. Returned when required arguments not provided.

403.description: Returned when the user is not authorized.
